intake_questions.text: List all business units that process personal data
Which categories of personal data are processed (name, email, biometric, health, financial)?
Do you transfer personal data outside India?
Are you a Significant Data Fiduciary (>1 lakh users or sensitive data)?
What is the primary lawful basis for processing (consent or legitimate use)?

scope_template.prompt: Identify each business unit processing personal data
List systems and applications storing or transmitting personal data
Confirm any systems explicitly excluded from the DPDP scope

requirements.text: A notice must be provided to data principals at or before collection, stating the purpose and personal data being collected.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Current privacy notice document; screenshot of notice at collection point

requirements.text: The notice must be available in English and at least one language listed in the Eighth Schedule upon request.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Language versions of the privacy notice; process for providing translated notice

requirements.text: Consent must be free, specific, informed, unconditional, and unambiguous via a clear affirmative action.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Consent UI screenshots; consent log samples; affirmative action mechanism description

requirements.text: Data principals must be able to withdraw consent as easily as it was given; withdrawal must not affect prior lawful processing.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Consent withdrawal UI or API; withdrawal audit log; user journey documentation

requirements.text: Consent records must demonstrate who consented, when, and for which purpose.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Consent database schema or log extract; retention policy for consent records

requirements.text: Data principals have the right to access a summary of personal data being processed and the processing activities.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Data access request SOP; SLA for responding to requests; sample fulfilled request

requirements.text: Data principals have the right to correction, completion, updating, and erasure of personal data no longer necessary.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Correction/erasure workflow; technical deletion mechanism; SLA for fulfilment

requirements.text: A grievance redressal mechanism must be established and grievances addressed within the prescribed period.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Grievance officer contact details; portal/email; SLA; sample resolved grievance

requirements.text: Reasonable security safeguards must be implemented to prevent personal data breach, including technical and organisational measures.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Information security policy; penetration test report (last 12 months); encryption evidence

requirements.text: Contracts with Data Processors must obligate equivalent security safeguards.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Data Processing Agreements with key vendors; vendor security assessment reports

requirements.text: In case of a personal data breach, the DPBI and affected data principals must be notified without delay.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Incident response and breach notification procedure; templates; tabletop exercise record

requirements.text: A Data Protection Officer or point of contact must be designated and made publicly accessible.
requirements.evidence_expectation: DPO appointment letter; public-facing DPO contact details

evidence_requests.title: Privacy Notice — current version
evidence_requests.description: Current privacy notice shown to data principals at or before collection

evidence_requests.title: Multilingual notice evidence
evidence_requests.description: Available language versions or process documentation for translated notices

evidence_requests.title: Consent mechanism screenshots
evidence_requests.description: Screenshots/recordings of consent UI confirming affirmative action

evidence_requests.title: Consent withdrawal mechanism
evidence_requests.description: Demo or docs of withdrawal process plus sample audit log

evidence_requests.title: Consent records extract
evidence_requests.description: Sample consent log showing who, when, purpose; retention policy

evidence_requests.title: Data access request SOP and sample
evidence_requests.description: SOP for access requests and a sample fulfilled response

evidence_requests.title: Erasure and correction workflow
evidence_requests.description: Technical and procedural docs for erasure/correction fulfilment

evidence_requests.title: Grievance portal and SLA
evidence_requests.description: Grievance officer details, portal/email, SLA, and resolved sample

evidence_requests.title: Security safeguards evidence pack
evidence_requests.description: IS policy, encryption policy, latest pentest report, patch management evidence

evidence_requests.title: Data Processing Agreements
evidence_requests.description: Signed DPAs with data processors; vendor security questionnaire results

evidence_requests.title: Incident response and breach notification plan
evidence_requests.description: IRP document, notification templates, most recent tabletop/drill record

evidence_requests.title: DPO appointment and public contact
evidence_requests.description: DPO designation record and evidence of public-facing contact details

task_templates.title: DPO/CISO interview — data processing overview and governance
Legal/compliance interview — consent and rights fulfilment
Data mapping workshop — personal data flows and systems
Privacy notice and consent mechanism review
Security safeguards and vendor DPA review
Breach response and grievance process review
Consent withdrawal and access request functional test
